title: millettia usaramensis subsp. australis
intro: Millettia usaramensis subsp. australis is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and aiding in the management of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Millettia usaramensis subsp. australis are often made by drying the leaves, roots, or bark, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
